message:
fix: align settings test with hidden providers, add fetch timeout

- Update TestServer_SettingsHandlers to expect empty keys list (API-key
  providers were intentionally hidden in the kagenti provider commit)
- Add AbortSignal.timeout to unguarded fetch in CardWrapper.tsx

Fixes #3512, Fixes #3513
